payload.body:
Implementation handoff for UKN-135AP:

Completed:
- Added a persisted workspace-level `sidebarCollapsed` preference and schema/API support for updating it.
- Wired the app shell header collapse/expand control to the persisted preference.
- Added keyboard shortcut support with `s` then `b`; the toggle tooltip documents the shortcut.
- Kept the settings sidebar usable in collapsed mode with icon-only navigation and accessible labels.
- Preserved the new preference in repository mutation cache updates and local workspace updates.

Branch:
- `cycle/UKN-135AP-sidebar-toggle`
- Commit: `bd4c77de7` (`UKN-135AP add sidebar collapse toggle`)
- Remote: `origin/cycle/UKN-135AP-sidebar-toggle`

Verification:
- `pnpm --filter @cycle/desktop typecheck`
- `pnpm --filter @cycle/api typecheck`
- `pnpm --filter @cycle/ui typecheck`
- `pnpm --filter @cycle/desktop test -- app-config shortcut-registry desktop-api --maxWorkers=1`
- `pnpm vitest run test/api.test.ts -t "serves local app config" --maxWorkers=1` from `packages/api`
- `pnpm lint`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check <changed files>`
- `git diff --check`

Known limitation:
- Full `pnpm --filter @cycle/api test -- api.test.ts --maxWorkers=1` still fails on the existing `creates request spans through the listening server runtime` assertion at `packages/api/test/api.test.ts:2437` (`httpSpan` undefined). The targeted settings/API test for this change passes.
